description: Uses a frozen linear mean regressor for mu and learns only sigma with a 3-layer MLP. This adapts the fixed-mu idea to tabular regression where inputs and targets do not share a space.
One 3-layer MLP jointly predicts the target mean vector and uncertainty vector.
Separate mu and sigma heads; sigma is trained against a detached copy of mu.
Separate heads; sigma receives the concatenation of the input features and detached mu.
